title: Chunka
description:
The best Chunk Loading Plugin Ever
[Beta]
body:
# 🌍 ChunkyReborn

**ChunkyReborn** is a modern, flexible chunk pre-generator for Minecraft servers.  
It offers shape selection, biome filtering, world border syncing, and live dashboard integration — all with intuitive commands and blazing-fast chunk generation.

---

## 🔧 Features

- ✅ Radius-based chunk pre-generation  
- ✅ Biome filtering (e.g., `plains`, `forest`, etc.)  
- ✅ Multiple shapes: `square`, `circle`, `hexagon`  
- ✅ Smart suggestions for optimal performance  
- ✅ Pause, resume, stop generation anytime  
- ✅ Define selection by center or coordinates  
- ✅ Sync with world border or world spawn  
- ✅ Real-time progress via Firebase dashboard  
- ✅ Quiet and silent modes for better UX  
- ✅ Clean help and reload support

---

## 📜 Commands

### 🎮 Main Commands

| Command | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `/chunkyreborn start <radius> [biomes...]` | Start chunk generation |
| `/chunkyreborn pause` | Pause the current generation |
| `/chunkyreborn resume` | Resume paused generation |
| `/chunkyreborn stop` | Stop and cancel generation |
| `/chunkyreborn progress` | Show generation progress |
| `/chunkyreborn pbar` | Shows a clean Bossbar |

---

### 🧭 Selection & Shape

| Command | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `/chunkyreborn shape <square|circle|hexagon>` | Set generation shape |
| `/chunkyreborn center [<x> <z>]` | Set generation center |
| `/chunkyreborn corners <x1> <z1> <x2> <z2>` | Select area using 2 corners |
| `/chunkyreborn radius <radius>` | Set radius for generation |
| `/chunkyreborn world <world>` | Set target world |
| `/chunkyreborn worldborder` | Use world border as selection |
| `/chunkyreborn spawn` | Center generation on world spawn |

---

### 🧠 Utility & Info

| Command | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `/chunkyreborn pattern <pattern>` | Set chunk generation pattern |
| `/chunkyreborn selection` | Show current generation selection |
| `/chunkyreborn silent` | Toggle silent mode (no chat messages) |
| `/chunkyreborn quiet <interval>` | Set quiet update interval (seconds) |
| `/chunkyreborn smart` | Automatically detect best settings |
| `/chunkyreborn trim` | Delete chunks outside current selection |

---

### ℹ️ Info & Help

| Command | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `/chunkyreborn help` | Show help menu |
| `/chunkyreborn about` | Info about the plugin |
| `/chunkyreborn version` | Show plugin version |
| `/chunkyreborn reload` | Reload the plugin configuration |

---

## ✅ Example

```sh
/chunkyreborn start 10 plains forest
